headline: Experian Expands Agent Trust Partner Ecosystem with Akamai to Advance Trusted AI Driven Commerce
summary: COSTA MESA, Calif., May 15, 2026--Experian today announced that Akamai Technologies has joined its growing partner ecosystem, designed to further advance secure, trusted AI driven commerce through the Experian Agent Trust™ framework, alongside partner Skyfire supporting emerging payment innovation.

headline: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Is Up 33.4% After Anthropic AI Deal And LayerX Buy - What's Changed
summary: Akamai Technologies recently secured a seven‑year, US$1.80 billion AI infrastructure contract with Anthropic, reported first‑quarter 2026 results, issued new guidance, filed a US$2.54 billion ESOP‑related shelf registration, and announced plans to acquire browser‑security firm LayerX for about US$205 million. Together these moves deepen Akamai’s role in AI and security infrastructure while reshaping its balance between large long‑term contracts, employee equity issuance, and targeted...
